body:
The muse, she is hiding today, so no new fic, unless she tiptoes out of wherever she’s lurking. Assuming power stays on, most likely will stream sometime early afternoon, after getting a little chance to enjoy the rare quiet day and then get around to getting all cleaned up. <3 Today we start Link to the Past on original hardware!


The pic I promised the other day is up and the next pair will be on display Monday, most likely. And remember, if I get to 100 followers, they’ll be more shown. ;) I hope you all have a wonderful day and maybe get to see you on Twitch later! <3
